import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn second_token(_ line: String) -> Option<String>
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + n
      end
    when None
      i = n + n
    end
  end
  if i >= n + n
    i = i - n - n
  else
    return None
  end
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = n + n + i
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      return None
    end
  end
  if i < n + n
    return None
  end
  i = i - n - n
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + n + i
      end
    when None
      return None
    end
  end
  if i < n + n
    return None
  end
  let start = i - n - n
  mut j = start
  while j < n
    match string.byte_at(line, j)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        j = n + n + j
      else
        j = j + 1
      end
    when None
      j = n + n + j
    end
  end
  let stop = if j >= n + n
    j - n - n
  else
    n
  end
  Some(string.substring(line, start, stop))
end

fn process(_ line: String, _ acc: Int) -> Int
  if string.is_empty(string.trim(line))
    acc
  else
    match second_token(line)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        acc + v
      when None
        acc
      end
    when None
      acc
    end
  end
end

mut total = 0
mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    total = process(line, total)
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
println("sum=#{total}")
